metadata.generated_from: Zentrid UI Normalization Mapping Excel files
metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for Zentrid UI field keys, labels, data types, units and business meanings across screens.

fields.normalization_rule: Convert W/MW to kW; preserve sign convention according to metric direction.
Normalize to kVA.
Normalize 0-100; validate vendor range.

fields.description: AC ток, если vendor показывает одно общее значение.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to A.
Map R/U/A naming variants to phase L1/R.
Map S/V/B naming variants to phase L2/S.
Map T/W/C naming variants to phase L3/T.
Normalize to Hz.
Store phase index L1/L2/L3.
Store phase index L1/L2/L3; do not average unless UI explicitly asks summary.
Convert W to kW.
Normalize to kVar; support negative values.
Map R/U/A naming variants to phase L1/R.
Map S/V/B naming variants to phase L2/S.
Map T/W/C naming variants to phase L3/T.

fields.description: AC напряжение, если vendor показывает одно общее значение.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to V.
Normalize timezone to UTC; display in plant timezone.
Map to Zentrid user if possible; else keep external actor label.
True if acknowledged_at or source processed/confirmed status exists.
Map all alert/alarm counts into active_alert_count. If source provides with_alerts/no_alerts tabs, calculate count when possible.
Map Enable/Disable to boolean.
Common control parameter; expose as capability-based setting.
Convert W to kW if required.

fields.description: How a value is aggregated in the period.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to instant, sum, average, min, max, last, cumulative.
Map to canonical categories: communication, grid, inverter, battery, meter, plant, integration, data_quality, security, other.

fields.description: Number of active alarms linked to topology node.
fields.normalization_rule: Count normalized active/open alerts by node_id; use vendor count only as quick display if detailed alarms unavailable.
Calculated/count by API; do not store as event record.
Calculated by query aggregation; display as KPI chips.
Generate internal UUID; keep source IDs in source_alert_id and source_refs.
Zentrid name from normalized dictionary; fallback source title.

fields.description: Есть ли активная тревога/ошибка по устройству.
Total active/relevant alarms for plant overview.
fields.normalization_rule: Prefer active alarm count for header; keep historical count separately. If Huawei combined string, split severity counters.
Normalize source type to alert, warning, fault, error, info, recovery.

fields.description: Уникальный код/идентификатор тревоги/ошибки из source системы.
fields.normalization_rule: Store source code in source_alert_code; generate Zentrid alert_id internally; normalize numeric codes as text.
Direct map; trim spaces; keep original in source_alert_name; Zentrid label can be translated later.
Map vendor values to Zentrid enum: fault, alarm, warning, info, protection_event, system_event.
Store as config parameter; validate range from vendor if present.
Normalize to °C; source may be weather station/API.
Convert MWh to kWh; label in UI can show MWh when large but canonical unit remains kWh.

fields.description: Zentrid top-level grouping for topology UI.
fields.normalization_rule: Map canonical_node_type to group: communication_assets, generation_assets, storage_assets, grid_assets, consumption_assets, environmental_assets, module_level_assets.
Build from Zentrid hierarchy store.
Use routing rules from category/severity/object.
Zentrid-only operational field; set via assignment/SOP/work order.
Zentrid workflow field; map source handler if available.
Create on sensitive status/assignment/close actions.
Do not store/display raw password. Expose only password reset/change action with audit.
Map Enable/Disable to boolean.
Convert to kW; not_supported if plant has no EPS/backup capability.
Convert vendor units to minutes if possible.
Do not hardcode; derive from capability_flags per connector/vendor/user permissions.
Direct numeric map in kWh. If '--' or empty, store null with data_status = no_data.
Convert W→kW; positive value represents charge
Normalize Today’s Charged / Daily charged / Charged Today to kWh.
Strip A; signed direction must follow Zentrid convention.
Parse integer/float; store as numeric counter.
Convert W→kW; positive value represents discharge
Normalize Today’s Discharged / Daily discharged / Discharged Today to kWh.
Normalize to kWh; timezone-aligned
Normalize to kWh; timezone-aligned
Pending/Passed/Failed mapped to pending/ok/failed.
Operating/Running/Open mapped to operating; Stopped/Standby mapped to standby; Fault mapped to fault.
Zentrid convention: positive=discharge to system, negative=charge from system
0..100%; round to 1 decimal
Normalize to percent; optional if vendor does not expose SOH.
Normalize to °C.
Strip V; number.
UI metadata; useful only for prototype/docs.
Strip unit; show in technical tab.
Requires audit logging

Normalize Export->can_export
Action capability; shown in toolbar if available.

Configuration permission

Normalize View->can_view

Topology access

fields.description: Zentrid canonical topology class used to render a unified tree.
fields.normalization_rule: Map vendor types to canonical catalog: plant, zone, array, string, inverter, microinverter, battery, bms, pcs, meter, logger, dongle, smartlogger, ev_charger, weather_station, module, optimizer, gateway, grid_interface.

fields.description: Flags describing what topology node supports in Zentrid.
fields.normalization_rule: Derive from vendor + device type + source API coverage. Examples: telemetry_supported, alarms_supported, commands_supported, firmware_supported, module_level_supported.

fields.description: Rated power/capacity of asset where applicable.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kW. For battery energy capacity use capacity_kwh separately.

fields.description: Rated energy capacity for batteries/storage systems.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kWh; leave blank for non-storage nodes.
Technical telemetry; optional.
Technical telemetry; optional.
Map to charge/discharge/idle/TOU/backup/unknown.

fields.description: Текущая мощность зарядки/разрядки одним знаком или отдельным режимом.
fields.normalization_rule: Positive/negative convention must be fixed in Zentrid: charge positive, discharge negative or use mode field.
Represent as array of periods: start, end, mode, repeat days, power limit.
Map Enable/Disable to boolean.
Enable/Disable → true/false.
If source has combined value, derive from charge_discharge_power_kw + mode.

fields.description: Название зарядного устройства в интерфейсе vendor.
fields.normalization_rule: If missing, fallback to device_sn or EV Charger + serial number.

fields.description: Операционное состояние: idle, charging, fault, unavailable.
fields.normalization_rule: Map charging/idle/fault/unavailable to Zentrid operating status dictionary.
Open/Close mapped to open/closed; keep vendor raw status.

fields.description: Zentrid internal child device id after resolving source serial.
fields.normalization_rule: Derived by vendor_mapping_model; do not display raw id in UI.

fields.description: Zentrid internal ID of child node in hierarchy.
fields.normalization_rule: Child must exist in topology node registry before relation is created.
Normalize known values: system_server, ntp, local.
Zentrid close action; vendor close if available.
pv_energy_today_kwh * tenant/regional CO2 factor
Convert kg to tonnes. Labels CO2 avoided/reduction/saved map to same field unless legal/reporting requires distinction.
Convert kg to tonnes; keep method/source if vendor-specific.
Date-only normalization; if source missing, mark no_data.
Keep as string/user reference if resolvable.
Convert to ISO date; do not infer if missing.

fields.description: Устройство связи, через которое батарея передает данные.
fields.normalization_rule: Связать с logger/dongle/inverter, если mapping известен.
If source gives data logger relationship, map as communicates_via relation. If not, infer only when explicit binding exists in device list.
Map good/poor/offline/stale/no_data/unknown; derive from last_seen and signal if needed.
Derive from last_update_time + device online counters if vendor does not provide direct communication status.
Keep as separate technical status; do not mix with device_status.
Normalize: Unconfirmed -> unacknowledged; Confirmed/Acknowledged -> acknowledged.
Create relationship: logger/gateway -> inverter.

fields.description: Статус связи/онлайн: Online, Offline, No Data, Unknown.

fields.normalization_rule: Default to 1 if vendor represents one charger as one connector and value is missing.

fields.description: Статус коннектора: available, charging, fault, occupied.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to available/charging/fault/occupied/unknown.

fields.description: Тип коннектора: Type 2, CCS, GB/T и т.д.
fields.normalization_rule: Keep vendor connector label; normalize later with connector catalog.

fields.description: Версия control board у microinverter или похожего устройства.
fields.normalization_rule: Keep as hardware/firmware version attribute.

fields.description: Whether control log is available for communication device.
fields.normalization_rule: Map to capability flag has_control_log; audit events stored separately.
Direct map. Normalize country names to ISO/canonical country dictionary when possible.
System timestamp.
Map vendor severity taxonomy to Zentrid severity.
If three-phase values exist, store phase_current_l1/l2/l3 separately.
Convert W to kW if source unit is W; preserve sign if import/export direction is encoded.
Store as user/tenant-specific saved view, not as metric value.
Integer, lifetime counter.
Normalize to kWh.
Convert units to kWh; source may require meter presence.
Normalize to kWh.
Store amount and currency separately when possible.

fields.description: Equivalent full-load hours for the day.
fields.normalization_rule: Keep numeric hours; may be derived as daily_yield_kwh / installed_capacity_kwp if not directly provided.
Convert units to kWh. If source has grid supply today, map after confirming direction equals import.
Normalize to kWh.
Normalize currency separately. Store amount and currency_code. If tariff missing, NULL with revenue_status.

fields.description: Percentage of generation consumed locally today.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert percent strings to decimal percent value 0-100; do not divide twice.
Convert MWh/Wh to kWh; align day by plant timezone.

fields.description: Period at which logger collects data from devices.
fields.normalization_rule: Parse '60 s' to numeric seconds; keep source raw value.
Derived by last_update_time threshold: fresh/stale/no_data.

fields.description: Freshness quality state used by Zentrid UI.
fields.normalization_rule: Derived by comparing now to last_update_time using vendor/tenant thresholds. Values: fresh, delayed, stale, no_data.

fields.description: Качество исторической точки: valid, missing, estimated, stale, invalid.
fields.normalization_rule: Set complete, partial, inferred, invalid, mapping_required based on required fields.

fields.description: Period at which logger uploads data to vendor platform.
fields.normalization_rule: Parse '5 Min' to numeric minutes; keep source raw value.

fields.description: Количество дневных часов за текущий день/период.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as daily metric. If source gives hh:mm, convert to decimal hours.
Parse value + unit; store numeric value in amperes.
Parse value + unit; store numeric value in volts.
source_system + plant_id + device_id + normalized_alarm_code + occurrence window.
Must require confirmation + RBAC + audit.
Use normalized dictionary text; fallback source description.
Prefer integration ingestion timestamp if source doesn't provide detection timestamp.

fields.description: Whether device detail has alarm section/tab.
fields.normalization_rule: Map to capability flag has_device_alarm_view; actual alarms go to Alarm domain.
Expose only if vendor API supports write action and user has rights.

fields.description: Zentrid internal device reference for device-level telemetry.
fields.normalization_rule: Resolve using source device id/SN and plant scope.

fields.description: Комбинированное поле для поиска и отображения, если имя и SN идут вместе.

fields.normalization_rule: Store as string; can be stale/live depending source.
Direct map when provided; else enrich from Device Registry by SN/device_id.
Use Zentrid device registry preferred name.
Validate 0-65535 where applicable.

fields.description: Operational role of the node inside plant topology.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to generate, convert, store, measure, communicate, control, consume, monitor_environment, protect, unknown.
Map Solax Follower to canonical role = follower/slave.
Map Solax Leader to canonical role = leader/master.
Extract serial number; for combined fields split SN and registration number where possible.
Online/Running/Operating → online/active; Offline/Disconnected → offline; Fault → fault.
Convert °C/°C/F to Celsius; map specific sensor label if source gives multiple temperatures.
Represent vendor topology as Zentrid device relationship graph, not just a visual screenshot.
Use vendor dashboard count if available; otherwise derive from device registry.
Map to canonical device catalog: inverter, battery, meter, logger, dongle, smartlogger, ev_charger, plant, grid, unknown.

fields.description: Whether UI/source exposes upgrade action for logger/datalogger.
fields.normalization_rule: Do not treat as data value; map to capability flag can_upgrade_device.
Open/Close mapped to open/closed; keep vendor raw status.
If source has combined value, derive from charge_discharge_power_kw + mode.
Calculate from SLA policy according to severity/category.

fields.description: Длительность тревоги от возникновения до восстановления или текущего момента.
fields.normalization_rule: If source duration exists store source text + parsed seconds; else calculate from occurred_at/recovered_at.
If recovered_at exists: recovered_at - occurred_at; else now - occurred_at.
Only available when RBAC permits and source/canonical field is editable.

fields.description: Electrical parent/connection point in the energy topology.
fields.normalization_rule: Keep separate from communication_parent_id; one device can have both structural and electrical relations.
Normalize 0-100; validate vendor range.
Normalize 0-100; validate vendor range.
Use Zentrid chart-ready series; source labels become widget mapping only.
pv + grid_import + battery_discharge - load - grid_export - battery_charge
ok/warning/error based on completeness and balance delta

fields.description: Visual/structured energy flow between PV, inverter, load, grid, battery.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as structured flow nodes/edges when possible; otherwise use available metrics and render Zentrid canonical diagram.

fields.description: Visual flow representation for inverter energy path.
fields.normalization_rule: Render in Zentrid from canonical live power metrics, not vendor image if possible.
Apply tariff profile to self-use, import, export, generation as configured

fields.description: Эквивалентные циклы, если vendor считает по энергии.
fields.normalization_rule: Use only if source provides equivalent cycles; do not derive without rule.
Normalize feed_to_grid / charge_battery / load_first where possible.
Zentrid can support native export of canonical relationship graph.

fields.description: Energy exported to grid for a period or cumulative counter.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kWh; track aggregation_type sum/cumulative.
Zentrid can support native export; source action is UI reference only.

fields.description: Экспорт topology данных с logger screen.
fields.normalization_rule: Same canonical export action; source field kept for traceability.
Zentrid can support native export even if vendor field is only a UI action.
Convert to kW; if only net grid_power exists, derive abs(min(grid_power,0)).
Normalize vendor values to normal/active/fault/unknown where possible.
Map vendor favorite/following fields to user-specific Zentrid favorite_flag, not plant master.
UI filter maps to alert_name contains.
UI filter maps to canonical_device_type.
UI filter maps to plant_name / plant_id.
UI filter maps to occurred_at between start/end.

Preserve vendor firmware type.
Command action; require RBAC, confirmation and audit.
Use for device firmware metadata.
Derive from non-zero active flows: pv_to_load, pv_to_battery, pv_to_grid, grid_to_load, battery_to_load
Select by capability flags: battery, grid, load, meter availability

Treat as command/config, not just metric; requires audit and capability flag.
Normalize to Hz.
Normalize to live, 1min, 5min, 15min, hourly, daily, monthly, yearly, lifetime.
Configuration parameter; should require permission to edit.

fields.description: Date when plant was connected to grid.
fields.normalization_rule: Parse vendor date/Excel serial into ISO date; keep timezone context if present.
Normalize to kWh; apply timezone day boundary
If source provides net grid power, export=max(-grid_power,0) after sign normalization
Parse numeric and convert to Hz.
Normalize to Hz.
Normalize to kWh; apply timezone day boundary
If source provides net grid power, import=max(grid_power,0) after sign normalization

fields.normalization_rule: Positive import / negative export OR split into import/export using sign rule
Keep source label; map to standardized grid_standard dictionary if used for compliance.

Normalize to V; validate configured range.
Generate by dedup/correlation rules.

True if meter exists or vendor exposes import/export fields

fields.description: Version of topology tree for audit and historical changes.
fields.normalization_rule: Increment when parent-child relation changes or device replacement changes path.

fields.description: Выбранный период исторических данных: day, week, month, year, total.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize vendor periods to day/week/month/year/total.
Parse percent value 0-100.
Normalize to percent 0-100.
Normalize to device, subsystem, plant, portfolio, integration, unknown.

fields.description: Energy imported from grid for a period or cumulative counter.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize Wh/MWh to kWh; define period_start/period_end for interval values.
Convert to kW; if only net grid_power exists, derive max(grid_power,0).
Normalize source enum; keep raw_source_value.

fields.description: Installed PV or station capacity used for KPI normalization.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert W/MW/kW/kWp to kWp. If source distinguishes DC/AC, store dc_capacity_kwp and ac_capacity_kw separately.

fields.description: Physical or logical location of the asset inside plant.
fields.normalization_rule: Use explicit vendor location if provided; otherwise derive from tree path.
Convert Ohm/MOhm to kOhm; validate non-negative.
Normalize to MOhm.
Integrated → integrated; Not integrated → not_integrated.
Split values like online/total; online count stored here, total in inverter_total_count.

fields.description: Total rated AC power of inverters.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert W/MW to kW. Keep separate from PV installed capacity.
Normalize to °C.
Split values like online/total; if missing derive from device registry.
Normalize irradiation/irradiance daily energy per area to kWh/m2.

fields.description: Solar irradiance from weather station/sensor if available.
fields.normalization_rule: Live irradiance maps to W/m2. Do not mix with daily irradiation kWh/m2.
Maps to Zentrid Admin

fields.description: Last access/registration timestamp when source exposes it separately from data update.
fields.normalization_rule: Store separately from last_data_at; do not use for live freshness unless source confirms semantics.
Use as freshness timestamp if last_update_time not available.

fields.description: Timestamp of latest data update received from source.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert Excel serial/vendor local time to ISO datetime; store timezone from plant/source; flag stale if older than threshold.

fields.description: Most recent fault timestamp shown in plant context.
fields.normalization_rule: Parse to UTC; use only for informational plant state, not event record.
Use latest timestamp across flow inputs; store source timestamp and normalized timestamp

fields.description: Last communication/access time for connectivity calculation.
fields.normalization_rule: If vendor has both data update and access time, store both; otherwise reuse last_data_at.
Use max(source updated time, Zentrid processing time).
Normalize timezone to plant timezone + store UTC timestamp.

fields.description: Время последнего обновления данных topology node.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize timestamp to plant timezone; keep source timezone offset.
Direct map if vendor exposes latest alert text.

fields.description: Geographic latitude for node/plant if available.
fields.normalization_rule: Usually inherited from plant; only store device-level coordinates when source explicitly supports it.

fields.description: Optional x coordinate for visual topology diagram layout.
fields.normalization_rule: Generate automatically from tree if vendor does not provide coordinates; user can override in Zentrid UI.

fields.description: Optional y coordinate for visual topology diagram layout.
fields.normalization_rule: Generate automatically from tree if vendor does not provide coordinates; user can override in Zentrid UI.

fields.description: Версия LCD, если есть у vendor.

fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to Hz.

Normalize to Hz.

fields.description: Geographic longitude for node/plant if available.

fields.description: Human-readable name displayed in topology tree and detail header.

Normalize Single-Phase to 1, Three-Phase to 3; keep original label if needed.
Store per-phase metrics: phase_a_current_a, phase_b_current_a, phase_c_current_a.
Store per-phase metrics: phase_a_voltage_v, phase_b_voltage_v, phase_c_voltage_v.
Plant-scoped permission

fields.description: Plant physical address displayed in plant profile.
fields.normalization_rule: Direct map. Keep original address; optionally geocode later into city/region/country/coordinates.

fields.description: Summary state of plant alarms shown in plant header.
fields.normalization_rule: If source exposes No Alerts/Warning/Fault map to alert_state; otherwise derive from alarm counters.
Workspace level summary, not row field.
Resolve through source plant mapping; keep source ref if unresolved.
Use for display; backend resolves plant_id via source mapping.
Store as string; never numeric; preserve leading zeros and country code.
Unified search over plant_name, plant_code/source_id, device_sn, owner account where available.
Normalize to Zentrid status dictionary: normal, warning, fault, offline, partially_offline, incomplete, commissioning, constructing, waiting, unknown.

fields.description: Normalized operational status of the plant.
fields.normalization_rule: Map Online/Normal/Running/Offline/Fault/etc. to Zentrid status dictionary: normal, warning, fault, offline, unknown.

fields.description: Available vendor/Zentrid sections for plant workspace navigation.
fields.normalization_rule: Zentrid controls navigation; vendor tabs indicate source coverage only.

fields.description: Plant business/type classification such as Residential, Commercial, PV+Grid.
fields.normalization_rule: Map source labels to Zentrid plant_type dictionary; keep raw value in source metadata.
Store as list if parser can split; otherwise preserve source string.
Direct map; keep as text, not number.

fields.description: Power generation chart on plant detail.
fields.normalization_rule: Zentrid should render canonical chart from time-series, not store vendor visual as data.
Normalize numeric value 0..1 or -1..1 depending source; validate range.
Open/Close mapped to open/closed; keep vendor raw status.
Derive from severity + customer SLA + asset criticality; values P1-P4.
Map from alarm dictionary; source cause retained if available.
Keep raw string; do not attempt semantic version comparison unless normalized version parser exists.
Store as device technical metadata.
Split composite value into voltage/current/power.
Split composite value into voltage/current/power.
Split composite value into voltage/current/power.
Represent as repeated metric rows or JSON object in source extension.

fields.description: DC current from PV input, usually per MPPT/string.
fields.normalization_rule: For multiple channels store as metric array pv_inputs[]; do not average.
Convert Wh/MWh to kWh; align to plant timezone business day
Normalize to kWh; cumulative counter should not decrease except replacement/reset
Infer from PV1-PV4 fields when available.
Convert W→kW; keep 3 decimals; positive value means production

fields.description: Share of PV energy going to home/load.
fields.normalization_rule: Map from source distribution when available; derive only when source metrics permit.

fields.description: DC voltage from PV input, usually per MPPT/string.
fields.normalization_rule: For multiple channels store as metric array pv_inputs[]; aggregate not recommended.
Set good when source value is valid/fresh; set stale/missing/invalid/estimated/calculated according to validation layer.
If vendor provides Ah only, do not convert unless voltage basis is known.
Parse number and convert W/MW to kW; remove unit text.
Store internal raw storage reference; not shown to client users.
Common control parameter; expose as capability-based setting.
Convert var/kVar/MVar to kVar; preserve sign.
Convert W/MW to kW. Use positive numeric value; direction belongs to flow fields, not plant power.

fields.description: Мощность в момент записи historical/report row.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert W to kW. Historical reports may contain sampled live values.
Normalize timezone to UTC; display in plant timezone.

fields.description: UI action to request fresh data.
fields.normalization_rule: Show only if Zentrid/source supports manual refresh capability.
Zentrid refresh triggers connector sync or reloads latest stored values.

fields.description: Manual refresh action available in plant detail.
fields.normalization_rule: Action should call Zentrid sync/refresh endpoint based on permissions and connector capability.

fields.description: Регистрационный номер устройства, если vendor разделяет SN и registration.
fields.normalization_rule: Parse from combined field; store separately; do not replace device_sn.
Map known metric labels to Zentrid metric_code list.

fields.description: Confidence score that the parent-child relation is correct.
fields.normalization_rule: 1.0 explicit vendor hierarchy; 0.8 explicit device binding; 0.6 inferred plant-device; lower requires review.
Normalize tree direction into source_node -> target_node.

fields.description: Тип связи между устройствами: communication, control, electrical, logical.
fields.normalization_rule: Sofar architecture = communication relation. Solax leader/follower = logical/control relation.
В Zentrid лучше хранить как related records, а не как текст.

fields.description: Replacement history or reference for device replacement workflow.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as replacement history relation when structured; otherwise keep source text.
Set when Zentrid workflow marks resolved/closed; not always same as recovered_at.

fields.description: Indicates whether tariff/revenue calculation is configured.
fields.normalization_rule: Map “Feed-in Tariff has not been set” to tariff_missing / revenue_unavailable.
Treat as session/access reference; do not expose without permission.
Map vendor roles to Zentrid RBAC roles
Enrich from Zentrid alarm dictionary / detail page; not required in list.

fields.description: Wi-Fi SSID/router name used by logger/dongle.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as source-sensitive technical field; do not expose to users without permission.

fields.description: Доступные действия по строке alarm list.
fields.normalization_rule: Map to Zentrid actions by capability: details, clear, acknowledge, create_task, create_work_order, export.
UI-only row number; do not use as stable ID.

fields.description: Дата или период, по которому пользователь смотрит исторические данные.
fields.normalization_rule: Store date as real date; for month/year keep period_start/period_end.

fields.description: Выбранные параметры для графика или таблицы.
fields.normalization_rule: Store selected metric_codes[]; UI can use canonical metric catalog.
min(pv_power, load_power) adjusted for battery topology when available
self_consumption_energy / pv_energy * 100
(load_energy - grid_import_energy) / load_energy * 100
Store as string; preserve leading zeroes and case.
Direct map to service_provider; link to organization registry later if known.

fields.description: Стоимость зарядной сессии, если vendor показывает финансовое значение.
fields.normalization_rule: Keep currency separately; do not mix with energy.
Convert hh:mm:ss to minutes; keep original raw value in raw payload.

fields.description: Энергия, переданная в рамках текущей/последней зарядной сессии.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert Wh/MWh to kWh.

fields.description: Время начала текущей или последней зарядной сессии.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize timezone to plant timezone; store source timestamp for traceability.
Normalize started/charging/finished/stopped/failed values.
Map to critical, major, minor, warning, info. Preserve source severity separately.
If numeric, store numeric_value and unit if known; if icon/level, map to weak/medium/good/excellent and keep raw.
Normalize RSSI/CSQ/percentage to Zentrid display percent where possible; keep raw value and unit.
Calculate from SLA policy and occurred/detected/assigned time.

fields.description: State of Charge — текущий уровень заряда.
fields.normalization_rule: Strip %, convert to decimal/number 0-100; validate range 0..100.
Хранить как raw string; для сравнения версий использовать отдельный parser.

fields.description: State of Health — состояние здоровья батареи.
fields.normalization_rule: Strip %, normalize 0-100. Huawei Battery Health Check is status, not numeric SOH; do not merge unless numeric.
Created when response workflow starts.
Auto-match by normalized_alarm_code/category/severity/device_type.
Keep as source reference; do not show to normal users by default.
Store unchanged; never overwrite.
Store unchanged for technical drill-down.
Store raw vendor identifier unchanged.
Use stable vendor ID where possible; fallback SN.

fields.description: Vendor-native object type before conversion into Zentrid canonical type.
fields.normalization_rule: Keep raw vendor type separately from canonical_node_type to avoid losing vendor semantics.

fields.description: Ссылка/ключ на исходную запись во внешней системе.
fields.normalization_rule: Store source_system + source_entity_id/source row key; used for replay/debug.

fields.description: Links to all vendor source records that contributed to this topology node/relation.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as array of {source_system, source_entity_type, source_entity_id, endpoint, raw_payload_ref}.
Store unchanged.

fields.description: Из какой vendor platform пришла тревога.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to controlled source_system dictionary.

fields.description: Команда запуска зарядки, если vendor/Zentrid поддерживает write-action.
fields.normalization_rule: Expose only when capability_flags.ev_charger_remote_control = true and role allowed.
Normalize to new, active, acknowledged, in_progress, recovered, resolved, closed, suppressed.
Expose only through command center with audit and confirmation.

fields.description: Number of strings under inverter/MPPT if available.
fields.normalization_rule: Use explicit architecture/topology source first; otherwise derive from child string/module relations.
Keep string/channel index; do not average across strings.

fields.description: Model of subordinate device linked to communication module.
fields.normalization_rule: Create child device relation if SN is available; otherwise store as subordinate summary.

fields.description: Serial number of device connected under the logger/dongle.
fields.normalization_rule: Store in device_relation table as child_device_source_id if it maps to a device; keep raw list if multiple.

fields.description: Type of subordinate device linked to communication module.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to canonical_device_type; use relationship table for multiple devices.

fields.description: Number/list of devices connected under logger/dongle.
fields.normalization_rule: If value is list, create subordinate_device_relation records; if count only, store count with source raw.
Use Zentrid SOP/alarm dictionary; fallback vendor treatment text.
Split combined Sunrise/Sunset source into sunrise_time and sunset_time.
Split combined Sunrise/Sunset source into sunrise_time and sunset_time.

fields.description: Показывает, что источник умеет отдавать humidity.
fields.normalization_rule: Set true when humidity field is supported by source.

fields.description: Показывает, что источник умеет отдавать irradiance.
fields.normalization_rule: Set true when vendor field exists, even if value is currently empty.

fields.description: Показывает, что источник умеет отдавать wind speed/direction.
fields.normalization_rule: Set true when wind fields are supported by source.

fields.description: Предустановленный набор параметров: AC Data, DC Current, DC Voltage и т.д.
fields.normalization_rule: Map vendor templates to Zentrid metric groups where possible.
Store separately from last_update_time.

fields.description: Electrical/system configuration such as PV + Grid, PV + Battery, hybrid.
fields.normalization_rule: Map to canonical system topology enum; source-specific unknown values remain raw until approved.
Validate 0-65535.
If source gives range, store min/max fields; if current, store temperature_c.
Normalize timestamp to plant timezone and store source_timestamp.
Direct map. Store IANA timezone when possible; keep vendor text as source value.
Map Enable/Disable to boolean. TLS/SSL can be displayed as Encryption.
UI visual node; if modeled, use node_type = cloud/root.

fields.description: Состояние актуальности topology по времени последнего обновления.
fields.normalization_rule: Derived from last_updated_at and configured freshness threshold.

fields.description: Internal Zentrid identifier of a node in the plant topology tree.
fields.normalization_rule: Generate Zentrid internal ID; never rely only on display name. Use vendor + source_entity_id + tenant + plant context for mapping.

fields.description: Пояснение vendor: фактическая topology отражается когда устройство загружает данные.
fields.normalization_rule: Store source note as help text; not a business status.
UI reference only; not core domain value.
Render from canonical relationships instead of storing as single text value.
Pure UI control; not backend data model field.

fields.description: Общая активная AC мощность на историческом графике.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kW.
Parse kW/W; convert to kW for UI.

fields.description: Емкость батареи в Ah, если vendor показывает Ah.
fields.normalization_rule: Store separately from rated_capacity_kwh.

fields.description: Суммарная энергия зарядки за весь период.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kWh; keep source counter provenance.
Convert units to kWh; if source repeats label Total in different blocks, bind by section context.
Keep W or convert to kW depending UI; canonical telemetry can store base unit W.

fields.description: Суммарная энергия разрядки за весь период.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kWh; keep source counter provenance.
Store amount and currency separately when possible.
Convert Wh/MWh to kWh; map feed-in/export/sold energy to export.
Normalize feed-in/export/sold energy to export kWh.
Convert Wh/MWh to kWh; map purchased/imported energy to import.
Normalize purchased/imported energy to import kWh.

fields.description: Общая выработка инвертора за весь срок.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize to kWh; remove thousands separators.

fields.description: Суммарная солнечная радиация / irradiance, полученная от метеостанции.
fields.normalization_rule: Normalize irradiance to W/m2. If source is kW/m2 multiply by 1000.

fields.description: Общая мощность PV/DC на момент записи.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert W to kW.
Extract integer from text like 'Total: 156'.
Normalize amount and currency; parse K/M suffixes carefully.
Convert MWh to kWh; keep cumulative counter quality flag.

fields.description: Depth of node inside Zentrid topology tree.
fields.normalization_rule: Calculate from parent-child relation path. Root plant = 0.

fields.description: Human-readable breadcrumb path for navigation and filtering.
fields.normalization_rule: Generate from resolved hierarchy; do not import as source of truth unless vendor provides explicit path.
Map all tree-equivalent labels to integer/decimal count; do not treat as real tree count.
Normalize W→kW, Wh→kWh, MWh→kWh or MW depending metric; keep source_unit_raw.

fields.description: Explains why field/relation cannot be shown for a vendor.
fields.normalization_rule: Use only when value is not supported by source; distinguish from no_data.
Long text; display detail or tooltip.
Normalize values later when more vendors available.
System timestamp.
Open upgrade history/records.

fields.description: Start time for topology relation validity.
fields.normalization_rule: Use source timestamp if available; otherwise use discovery/import time and mark provenance accordingly.

fields.description: End time for topology relation validity.
fields.normalization_rule: Null means active relation. Do not delete historical relations; close validity period.

fields.description: Идентификатор транспортного средства, если vendor передает.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as external reference; link to Zentrid vehicle entity only if module exists.
Preserve vendor model as text; do not normalize unless model catalog exists.
If three-phase values exist, store phase_voltage_l1/l2/l3 separately.
Map vendor warning to Zentrid warning severity.
Convert Excel serial/date text to date; keep source timezone neutral.
Direct map; optional source may be vendor weather provider.
Normalize Online/Offline/No Data/Alarm to Zentrid status dictionary.

fields.description: Направление ветра. Может быть числом в градусах или текстовым направлением.
fields.normalization_rule: If numeric, store degrees. If textual N/NE/etc., preserve label and optionally map to degrees later.

fields.description: Wind speed from source weather card.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert m/s to km/h if needed; keep NULL if missing.
Normalize to m/s. Convert km/h by /3.6 if source unit differs.
Normalize Annual/Yearly yield to kWh. Convert MWh to kWh.
